faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in East Harlem?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in East Harlem typically ranges from $800 to $4,000, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, ensuring transparency for all East Harlem homeowners and landlords.

faqs.question: What are signs of termites in East Harlem buildings?
faqs.answer: Common signs include hollow-sounding wood, discarded wings near windows and doors, mud tubes on foundation walls, buckling paint or floors, and visible droppings that resemble sawdust. East Harlem's older brownstones and pre-war buildings are especially susceptible, so annual inspections are recommended for properties over 50 years old.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in East Harlem?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in East Harlem are completed in 1-2 days, depending on property size and infestation severity. Liquid treatments typically take 4-6 hours, while bait systems require multiple visits over several weeks. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your East Harlem home or business.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite treatment guarantees in East Harlem?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive warranties on all termite treatments in East Harlem, typically ranging from 1-5 years depending on the treatment method. Our guarantees include free re-treatments if termites return during the warranty period, plus annual inspections to ensure your Manhattan property remains termite-free.
